```py

```

```py
[In]: import re
[In]: def clean_reviews(text):
text=re.sub("[^a-zA-Z]"," ",str(text))
return re.sub("^\d+\s|\s\d+\s|\s\d+$", " ", text)
[In]: df['Summary']=df.Summary.apply(clean_reviews)
[In]: df.head(10)
[Out]:
```
